productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed Green T-shirt
description: Composition Green and grey Official Merchandise manchester united hooded t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has mock-layered long sleeves with navy top layer and grey lower and brand badge appliqué d on right sleeve, hood with grey lining and four buttoned placket, inner back neck seam binding, distressed print on chest Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron, do not iron on print Dress for greatness with this Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club T-shirt. This soft and comfortable top with hood and double layered sleeves pays homage to the incredibly successful team with bold text and club badge on the front. Team this with a tee and Man U trackpants for a trip to a football match or for casual outings when only the genuine Man U article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M, on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
